"D:\Apps\CLion 2022.2.3\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\lab5__kr5_.dir/objects.a
"D:\Apps\CLion 2022.2.3\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\lab5__kr5_.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\lab5__kr5_.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Apps\CLion 2022.2.3\bin\mingw\bin\gcc.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\lab5__kr5_.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o lab5__kr5_.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblab5__kr5_.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\lab5__kr5_.dir\linklibs.rsp
